summary: Deliver Dashboard v0 skeleton pages with loopback-only serving and smoke coverage so Quick Capture / People / Events / Drafts / Queue / Self Mirror / Dev Digest are all openable.
digestBullets: Added loopback-only dashboard skeleton server with seven required page routes.
Kept v0 pages lightweight with shared nav/layout and placeholder sections.
Added route smoke test to verify root redirect, route availability, and 404 behavior.
Wired web route smoke check into scripts/test.sh for repeatable validation.
